count_note: 18 entries have source_type AI_GENERATE in image_plan.json. Declared count 15 reflects 3 images (IMG001/S001, IMG007/S008, IMG016/S020) that have real photo candidates pending legal review and are expected to be replaced. All 18 are included in this audit.

critical_findings.description: PROMPT_008 (mine tunnel — safety-controlled, mandatory human review) is assigned via prompt_id_ref to IMG008 (S009 school interior). This is a data error in image_plan.json. PROMPT_008 must only be used under the IMG009 mandatory human review gate (S011a mine tunnel). Using it for S009 would generate an unreviewed mine tunnel image in the school interior scene — a critical mismatch and safety bypass.
critical_findings.action_required: BLOCK IMG008. Correct image_plan.json prompt_id_ref for IMG008 to a school-interior-appropriate prompt.

critical_findings.description: IMG005 (scene S009) has prompt_id_ref PROMPT_005 (aerial island CG view). S009 is the school interior scene. An aerial island image would be used as school interior B-roll — completely wrong. Additionally, S009 is assigned TWO images (IMG005 AND IMG008), both with wrong prompts. Scene.json assigns S009 to IMG008. IMG005 appears to be an orphan from the original S007 aerial AI slot (before S007 became a real photo).
critical_findings.action_required: BLOCK IMG005. Investigate: is IMG005 an orphan from S007 aerial (superseded by real photo)? If so, suppress IMG005 or reassign to S009 with a school interior prompt.

critical_findings.description: Systematic prompt-scene mismatch throughout image_plan.json. The prompt_id_ref numbers in image_plan.json do not align with the scene assignments in ai_image_prompts.md. Examples: IMG014 (S017 light-beam interior) references PROMPT_014 (wide ocean landscape); IMG015 (S018 storm ruins) references PROMPT_015 (faded sign close-up); IMG017 (S021 heritage plaque) references PROMPT_017 (tourist vessel). A systematic offset exists in the numbering.
critical_findings.action_required: Use content-matched prompts for each scene as defined in generation_queue.json. Do not use prompt_id_ref from image_plan.json for generation — use the corrected prompt text in generation_queue.json.

critical_findings.description: PROMPT_019 does not exist. IMG019 (S023) references PROMPT_019 in image_plan.json but ai_image_prompts.md only defines PROMPT_001 through PROMPT_018.
critical_findings.action_required: Use PROMPT_017 content (tourist vessel) for IMG019/S023. PROMPT_019 is a missing definition, not a blocked image.

critical_findings.description: PROMPT_008 (mine tunnel) requires prompt rewrite before use for IMG009. Current version uses 'oppressive atmosphere' which biases AI models toward suffering/human-coded outputs in mine/tunnel contexts. Negative prompt must be expanded to explicitly exclude silhouettes, human shapes, implied human presence.
critical_findings.action_required: Use PROMPT_008_SAFE (rewritten version in generation_queue.json) for IMG009 generation.

audit_results.scene_match: PASS — island exterior wide matches S001 Hook opening

per_image_audit.hold_reason: Await legal decision on C001-A before committing to AI generation.

audit_results.scene_match: PASS — crumbling corridor, broken staircase, light through windows matches S002

per_image_audit.mismatch_detail: scene.json S003 visual_description says 'Close-up of a decayed wooden door. Peeling paint, encroaching vines.' PROMPT_003 generates 'ocean waves crashing against concrete seawall.' Both are safe, but the visual description and prompt do not match.

audit_results.scene_match: FAIL — S003 needs wooden door close-up, prompt generates ocean waves

per_image_audit.classification_reason: Either (A) rewrite prompt to match scene description (wooden door texture), or (B) accept ocean waves if director prefers wave-based visual for S003. Either output is safe. Corrected prompt provided in generation_queue.json.
per_image_audit.note: Use corrected prompt from generation_queue.json. Both options (door or waves) are safe.

audit_results.factual_appropriateness: PASS — simulated archival style, labeled as illustrative
audit_results.no_identifiable_people: PASS — explicit: no faces, no color (helps prevent face generation)
audit_results.no_forced_labor_depiction: PASS — Meiji era industrial context, not wartime forced labor
audit_results.no_horror_exaggeration: PASS — industrial landscape is appropriate historical atmosphere
audit_results.respectful_tone: PASS — archival aesthetic is respectful to industrial history
audit_results.scene_match: PASS — Meiji industrial, smokestacks, archival style matches S005
audit_results.visual_style_match: PASS — black and white, sepia, vintage

per_image_audit.note: Ensure video labels this as 'illustrative archival simulation' not as actual historical photograph.

per_image_audit.mismatch_detail: PROMPT_005 is an aerial CG island view ('Aerial bird's eye view of a small isolated concrete island in open ocean'). S009 is a SCHOOL INTERIOR scene ('Interior of ruined school building. Overturned desks and chairs. Faded chalk on blackboard.'). Completely unrelated visual subjects.

audit_results.scene_match: FAIL — aerial island CG for school interior scene: WRONG IMAGE ENTIRELY
audit_results.data_error_flag: IMG005 appears to be an orphan slot from the original S007 aerial AI assignment (before S007 received a real photo). The image slot was retained but never given a valid school interior prompt.

per_image_audit.classification_reason: Critical prompt-scene mismatch. IMG005 cannot be generated with PROMPT_005 for S009. Also duplicate: S009 already assigned IMG008 in scene.json. Resolution: determine whether IMG005 slot should be suppressed (aerial replaced by real photo) or reassigned to S009 with a school interior prompt. See CF002.
per_image_audit.block_reason: Data error in image_plan.json. Prompt generates aerial island CG; scene requires school interior. Cannot generate until corrected.

per_image_audit.mismatch_detail: PROMPT_007 is 'Interior ruin detail, close-up of metal chair frame partially collapsed.' S008 needs EXTERIOR of Building 30 (30-go-to), 9-story concrete apartment block — a wide establishing exterior shot. Interior chair detail ≠ Building 30 exterior.
per_image_audit.classification_reason: (1) Real photo candidate C008-A (CC BY-SA 4.0) pending legal review — real photo is strongly preferred. (2) If AI fallback required: prompt must be rewritten for Building 30 exterior wide shot. Corrected prompt (PROMPT_006 content) provided in generation_queue.json. Also note: structure_mismatch_flag=true — confirm with scene.json whether scene S008 requires Building 30 (residential) or industrial hoistroom before generating.

per_image_audit.mismatch_detail: PROMPT_008 is the MINE TUNNEL safety-controlled prompt ('Abstract mine tunnel interior, narrow passage... oppressive atmosphere, no people'). S009 is the SCHOOL INTERIOR scene. This is a complete subject mismatch AND creates a safety concern: PROMPT_008 is under a mandatory human review gate (IMG009), but this assignment would generate a mine image outside that gate, bypassing the safety review.

audit_results.safety_gate_bypass: CRITICAL — using PROMPT_008 for S009 generates an unreviewed mine tunnel image. PROMPT_008 is controlled under IMG009 mandatory human review gate. Using it outside that gate violates FIX-M1 protocol.
audit_results.forced_labor_depiction_risk: INHERITED FROM IMG009 — PROMPT_008 has elevated risk of generating human-coded imagery in mine context

per_image_audit.classification_reason: Critical dual failure: (1) Wrong prompt for scene — mine tunnel prompt for school interior. (2) Safety gate bypass — PROMPT_008 is safety-controlled and must only be generated under the IMG009 mandatory human review gate. Generating it here would produce an unreviewed mine image for a non-mine scene. BLOCK IMMEDIATELY. Correct image_plan.json: assign school interior prompt to S009 (IMG008). See CF001.
per_image_audit.block_reason: Data error + safety gate bypass risk. PROMPT_008 is not permitted outside IMG009 controlled generation context.

per_image_audit.mandatory_human_review_reason: Scene depicts interior of site where forced labor occurred during WWII. Any human form, silhouette, shadow, or implied human presence in output constitutes an AI-generated depiction of forced labor victims — absolutely prohibited.

audit_results.factual_appropriateness: CONDITIONAL — mine tunnel context is factually appropriate for S011a, but execution requires exact safety conditions
audit_results.no_real_victims: CONDITIONAL — 'no people' in prompt but insufficient; visual_risk_report notes AI models (MJ v6, DALL-E 3, SDXL) regularly generate human silhouettes/shadows in tunnel scenes even with explicit --no people
audit_results.no_forced_labor_depiction: HIGH RISK — prompt includes 'oppressive atmosphere' which biases models toward confinement/suffering imagery in mine context
audit_results.no_horror_exaggeration: MEDIUM RISK — 'noir lighting, oppressive atmosphere, deep shadow' borders on horror. Replace with 'austere industrial atmosphere'
audit_results.no_sensational_tragedy: CONDITIONAL — depends on final output; must be reviewed
audit_results.respectful_tone: CONDITIONAL — empty atmospheric space is respectful; any human form is not
audit_results.scene_match: PASS — mine tunnel for mine scene
audit_results.youtube_safe: CONDITIONAL — requires human review of output before use

per_image_audit.original_prompt: Abstract mine tunnel interior, narrow passage disappearing into darkness, single dim light source casting harsh shadows on rough rock walls, deep shadow, noir lighting, oppressive atmosphere, no people, abstract and atmospheric, cinematic close-up perspective --ar 16:9 --no people, modern equipment, text
per_image_audit.rewritten_prompt: Abstract empty coal mine tunnel interior, empty industrial passage disappearing into darkness, single dim work light casting stark shadows on rough hewn rock walls, exposed wooden support timbers, bare stone floor, deep shadow, austere industrial atmosphere, no human presence of any kind, no people, empty space only, abstract and atmospheric, cinematic close-up perspective --ar 16:9 --no people, human figures, silhouettes, shadows of persons, human shapes, implied human presence, victims, bodies, suffering, gore, violence, chains, shackles, bones, faces, modern equipment, text
rewrite_changes: Replaced 'oppressive atmosphere' with 'austere industrial atmosphere' — removes suffering-bias conditioning
Added 'no human presence of any kind, empty space only' to positive prompt for dual reinforcement
Added 'exposed wooden support timbers, bare stone floor' for specific structural anchoring (less model freedom for imagination)
Expanded negative prompt from 3 terms to 18 explicit terms covering all human presence variants
per_image_audit.classification_reason: Must use rewritten prompt (PROMPT_008_SAFE). After generation: human must review every output before approving. Rejection criteria: any human form, silhouette, shadow readable as human, implied suffering, confinement imagery. Max 3 generation attempts. If rejected 3 times: use fallback IMG010.
per_image_audit.review_gate_instructions: Generate → Human reviews every output → If ANY human form/silhouette/shadow readable as human: REJECT. Attempt max 3 times. If all 3 fail: activate fallback IMG010 (PROMPT_013 rock texture).

per_image_audit.mismatch_detail: PROMPT_010 is 'Abandoned weathered book lying on a crumbling concrete desk.' S011b is 'Extreme close-up of tunnel rock face. Contact surface of concrete and raw rock. Visible light source in distance.' Book/desk ≠ rock tunnel texture.

audit_results.factual_appropriateness: PASS — book still life is safe
audit_results.no_forced_labor_depiction: PASS for PROMPT_010 content; however S011b is still in the mine tunnel section — using a book/desk image here creates a jarring contextual mismatch
audit_results.scene_match: FAIL — book on desk ≠ rock face close-up
audit_results.visual_style_match: PARTIAL — warm amber tones differ from the cool dark tunnel palette needed for S011b

per_image_audit.classification_reason: PROMPT_010 content is safe but wrong for this scene. S011b is the geological texture companion to the mine scene (S011a). Must use PROMPT_013 adapted for rock face texture. Corrected prompt in generation_queue.json.
per_image_audit.note: Use corrected prompt (rock face macro) not PROMPT_010. Also note: IMG010 is the fallback if IMG009 is rejected 3 times — so IMG010 must be generated regardless of IMG009 outcome.

per_image_audit.mismatch_detail: PROMPT_011 is 'Dramatic shafts of natural light breaking through collapsed concrete ceiling.' S013 is 'Wide view of island ruins. UNESCO World Heritage symbol evoked or implied. Wide angle suggesting tension between heritage designation and historical truth.' Light-beam close-up ≠ UNESCO tension wide shot. However, light breaking through ruins is a poetically valid visual for the tension between beauty and tragedy.

audit_results.scene_match: PARTIAL — editorial argument: light through ruins = metaphor for heritage/history tension. But literal match is weak.

per_image_audit.classification_reason: Prompt is safe but visually duplicates S017 (which also uses light-beam imagery per PROMPT_011). Two scenes with identical visual treatment creates repetition. Options: (A) Accept duplication and use PROMPT_011 as-is for both. (B) Rewrite S013 prompt as wide exterior ruins shot. Director's choice.

per_image_audit.mismatch_detail: PROMPT_012 is 'Stormy grey ocean waves near a dark concrete structure.' S015 is 'Island after mine closure. Ruined pier. Stillness as contrast to former bustle.' Storm waves ≠ still dock. Stormy waves would visually contradict the scene's purpose of expressing stillness and desolation after closure.

audit_results.scene_match: FAIL — storm ≠ stillness; scene requires calm desolate dock atmosphere

per_image_audit.classification_reason: Correct prompt for S015 is PROMPT_009 content ('Empty abandoned dock or pier, calm water, desolate atmosphere'). PROMPT_012 (storm) is safe but wrong for this scene. Corrected prompt in generation_queue.json.
per_image_audit.note: Use PROMPT_009 content (dock/pier), not PROMPT_012 (storm). Storm prompt is appropriate for S018 instead.

per_image_audit.mismatch_detail: PROMPT_013 is 'Extreme macro close-up of crumbling concrete wall surface, deep cracks, rusted rebar.' S016 is 'Close-up of abandoned personal items: child's shoe, indistinct old photograph, rusted metal can.' Concrete texture macro ≠ personal belongings still life.
per_image_audit.classification_reason: Correct prompt for S016 is PROMPT_010 adapted for personal items (child's shoe, faded photograph, rusted can). Also note: scene.json notes 'No identifiable faces in any photographs depicted. People must be unidentifiable.' Corrected prompt must enforce this.
per_image_audit.note: Rewritten prompt must include 'photographs too faded or damaged to show identifying detail' — photos within the image must not depict identifiable faces.

per_image_audit.mismatch_detail: PROMPT_014 is 'Minimalist wide landscape, ocean horizon, barely visible silhouette of ruined island in far distance.' S017 is 'Ruined room interior. Light beams cutting through dust and debris. Light itself provides the motion.' Wide ocean landscape ≠ interior room with light beams.
per_image_audit.classification_reason: Correct prompt for S017 is PROMPT_011 content ('Dramatic shafts of natural light breaking through collapsed ceiling'). PROMPT_014 is appropriate for S020 (wide landscape). Corrected prompt in generation_queue.json.

per_image_audit.mismatch_detail: PROMPT_015 is 'Close-up of concrete ruin wall with partially visible faded Japanese signage.' S018 is 'Post-typhoon ruins. Collapsed walls, exposed rebar. Weathering suggesting 35 years of erosion. Cool dawn light.' Wide storm ruin shot ≠ faded sign close-up.

audit_results.scene_match: FAIL — faded sign close-up ≠ wide storm ruins

per_image_audit.classification_reason: Correct prompt for S018 is PROMPT_012 content ('Stormy grey ocean waves near dark concrete structure'). PROMPT_015 is appropriate for S021. Corrected prompt in generation_queue.json.

per_image_audit.mismatch_detail: PROMPT_016 is 'Abstract ocean waves in extreme wide shot, island edge barely visible at far left or right of frame — minimalist, island nearly absent.' S020 is 'Hashima Island at dusk or dawn. Sky, sea, and ruins. Quiet and majestic. Extreme wide with very slow pan.' S020 needs the island more visually present and grand (dusk/dawn). PROMPT_016 is more appropriate for the S022 Ma beat pure silence (where near-absence of the island is the point).

audit_results.scene_match: PARTIAL FAIL — island too absent for S020 narrative weight

per_image_audit.classification_reason: (1) Real photo candidate C020-A (CC BY-SA 4.0, visual match 8/10, dusk shot) pending legal review. PIXTA paid stock strongly recommended for this position. Generate AI only as final fallback. (2) If AI fallback: use PROMPT_014 content (wide landscape with island silhouette more prominent) not PROMPT_016 (abstract ocean, island barely present).
per_image_audit.hold_reason: Await legal decision on C020-A / PIXTA purchase decision.

per_image_audit.mismatch_detail: PROMPT_017 is 'Small tourist vessel on calm ocean approaching large weathered concrete island.' S021 is 'Contrast of heritage plaque with surrounding ruins. Metal plate against rusted concrete. Close-up.' Tourist vessel ≠ heritage plaque close-up.
per_image_audit.classification_reason: Correct prompt for S021 is PROMPT_015 content (faded sign/plaque close-up adapted for heritage plaque). PROMPT_017 is appropriate for S023. Corrected prompt in generation_queue.json.

per_image_audit.mismatch_note: PROMPT_018 generates 'Hashima Island full panoramic view, concrete ruins rising from ocean, wide sky, clouds.' S022 is the Ma beat wide shot. PROMPT_016 (abstract ocean, island barely visible) would be more abstractly 'empty' for a pure Ma beat. However PROMPT_018 panoramic view is an acceptable interpretation — it gives the viewer the island to contemplate during the 40-second silence.

audit_results.respectful_tone: PASS — 'haunting and beautiful' is appropriate for Ma beat
audit_results.scene_match: ACCEPTABLE — panoramic for Ma beat is valid editorial choice

per_image_audit.note: Director may optionally substitute PROMPT_016 (abstract ocean) for a more minimalist Ma beat interpretation. Both are safe.

summary.img009_status: HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED — must use rewritten PROMPT_008_SAFE; human must review every output; max 3 attempts; fallback IMG010 if all fail
summary.generation_may_begin_detail: Generation may begin for 12 of 18 images (3 READY + 9 READY_WITH_REWRITE using corrected prompts from generation_queue.json). Generation is NOT permitted for IMG001/IMG007/IMG016 (await legal review) or IMG009 (safety gate protocol required). IMG005 and IMG008 are BLOCKED pending data error resolution.
summary.exact_next_action: Step 1: Resolve IMG005/IMG008 data errors (assign school interior prompt to S009, eliminate duplicate). Step 2: Generate IMG002, IMG004, IMG018 (READY — no prompt changes needed). Step 3: Generate IMG003, IMG010, IMG011, IMG012, IMG013, IMG014, IMG015, IMG017, IMG019 using corrected prompts from generation_queue.json. Step 4: Generate IMG009 using PROMPT_008_SAFE with mandatory human review gate. Step 5: After legal review on S001/S008/S020 — if legal fails, generate IMG001/IMG007/IMG016 using corrected prompts.
